title: Alpha Nights
body:
!! Warning! This data pack might be too frightening for certain people !!


**So what Herobrine can do?**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

summon redstone torchs

summon redstone dusts

remove leaves from trees

play scary noises

summon hostile cow/chicken

summon lightning bolts

send messages in the chat

summon signs

set time night

jump scare you

create tunnels

give you blindness
</details>
